mapper.select: select count(1) as orderNum,sum(a.num) as orderVolume,sum(a.z_price) as orderRevenue,sum(ifnull(d.commission,0)) as orderCommission from lkt_order a left join lkt_order_details d on d.r_sNo=a.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list as p on p.id = d.p_id left join lkt_living_room r on d.living_room_id = r.id left join lkt_mch m on m.id = p.mch_id left join lkt_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id
select sum(re.re_money) as returnMoney from lkt_return_order re left join lkt_order a on re.sNo=a.sNo

select count(1) from ( SELECT a.id FROM lkt_product_list a LEFT JOIN lkt_configure b ON a.id = b.pid WHERE ifnull(b.commission,'')!='' and a.mch_id=#{mch_id} and b.recycle=0 and a.status=2 and b.update_time >= #{startTime} and b.update_time <= #{endTime} group by a.id ) p
